title: In Southeast Asia, Switching to Solar Offers Relief from Energy Crisis Caused by Iran War
summary_full: Homeowners and businesses in the region, which relies heavily on imported oil, are installing rooftop solar panels to reduce the sting of soaring energy costs.
summary_public: Homeowners and businesses in the region, which relies heavily on imported oil, are installing rooftop solar panels to reduce the sting of soaring energy costs.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Energy Crisis Caused by Iran War
